description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided briefcase with a metallic and synthetic exterior, featuring reinforced corners and a robust, industrial design. The main body is a light metallic color, bordered by darker, textured bands that wrap around the edges and corners for added durability. The front side displays a prominent, sturdy handle made of metal or hard plastic, flanked by two metal latches for secure closure. The surface has a slightly glossy finish, suggesting a protective coating, and the corners are capped with rounded, metallic reinforcements. No external pockets or branding are visible, giving the briefcase a utilitarian and professional appearance. The overall construction suggests it is designed to protect valuable or sensitive contents during transport in urban environments.
description: A hard-sided, metallic briefcase with reinforced corners, a sturdy handle, and secure metal latches. Its design is utilitarian and professional, with a glossy, protective finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main handle, two metal latches, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the briefcase and the edge reinforcements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted surface with reinforced corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the edge and corner details.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed handle, rectangular in shape, made of metal or hard plastic, attached with metal brackets to the front center.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two metal latches located on the front, one on each side of the handle; no visible combination or key lock.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Rounded metallic corner reinforcements on all eight corners, providing extra protection.
